login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Sign in to access your courses and track your progress.

hero.description: Four structured cohorts that turn you into an AI-first builder — no prior AI experience necessary. Curated by industry leaders.

journey.title: Your AI Journey
journey.description: Four progressive courses — each building on the last — culminating in AI that you'll build and deploy yourself.

courses.title: Four Courses. One Transformation.
courses.description: From theory to deployment, each course builds on the previous — tackling real problems with real tools and industry mentors by your side.

items.title: AI Fundamentals
items.description: Master the foundations of AI, large language models, and prompt engineering. Build intuition before you build products.

items.title: AI Product Builder
items.description: Build and ship your first AI-powered product — using APIs, no-code tools, and real user feedback loops.

items.title: Multi-Agent Systems
items.description: Design, orchestrate, and deploy autonomous AI agents that collaborate to solve complex tasks.

items.title: Launch & Scale
items.description: Launch your AI product, acquire early users, and build infrastructure that scales beyond day one.

impact.title: Built for Real Impact
impact.description: Our curriculum is crafted in partnership with industry leaders — bridging the gap between AI knowledge and real-world application that creates careers.

features.title: Real Projects
features.description: Build products that solve actual problems, not toy demos.

features.title: Expert Mentors
features.description: Weekly sessions with practitioners from top AI companies.

features.title: Certification
features.description: Earn verifiable certificates recognized by hiring teams.

features.title: Global Community
features.description: Join a cohort of builders from 40+ countries worldwide.

registration.successMessage: Thank you for registering for the AI-Native Summer Series 2026. We'll review your profile and get back to you shortly with next steps.
